firstName.contain: First name can contain only letters, spaces, apostrophe and hyphen
firstName.length: First name must be from 1 to 25 characters

lastName.contain: Last name can contain only letters, spaces, apostrophe and hyphen
lastName.length: Last name must be from 1 to 25 characters

workspace.length: Workspace name must be from 2 to 25 characters

nickname.contain: Nickname should contain only latin characters, underscores and dot
nickname.start: Nickname can't start with a dot
nickname.end: Nickname can't end with a dot
nickname.dots: Nickname can't have more than one dot in a row
nickname.length: Nickname must be from 6 to 20 characters
nickname.containResult: Nickname can contain only A - Z, 0 - 9, underscores and dots

email.contain: Email should contain only latin characters
email.length: Email must be from 7 to 50 characters
